page: OVHcloud b3-128 is a general-purpose cloud server powered by an AMD EPYC Milan processor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs operating at a base frequency of 2.3 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 128.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. Local storage is supported by a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and network connectivity is provisioned with an 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth. The system runs on a KVM hypervisor and includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong capabilities across compute and memory subsystems. The single-core CPU performance ranks in the top tier (top 10%) via stress-ng, while multi-core performance and Geekbench scores consistently place in the top 25%. Memory performance is a notable highlight, with PassMark memory scores reaching the top 10% tier and uncached read/write memory bandwidth tests placing in the top 25%. Database operations, such as Redis SET operations, and software compilation tasks also perform in the top 25% tier, though static web serving and single-threaded compression tasks align with average mid-tier performance.

This server offers a balanced resource profile, combining dedicated CPU cores with high-speed NVMe storage and robust memory bandwidth. It is well-suited for multi-threaded workloads, database operations, software compilation, and moderate-scale LLM inference tasks.
description: OVHcloud b3-128 is a general-purpose server configured with 32 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan physical cores (32 vCPUs) running at 2.3 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, a 400 GB NVMe SSD, and an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, this instance delivers top-tier single-core CPU and memory performance, with multi-core benchmarks, database operations, and software compilation tasks consistently ranking in the top 25%. The balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core and dedicated CPU allocation make it a highly capable option for multi-threaded workloads, database hosting, and general-purpose enterprise applications.
og_description: OVHcloud b3-128 is a general-purpose server featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 128 GB RAM, and 400 GB NVMe storage, delivering top-tier memory and strong multi-core benchmark performance.
